infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs camera access to take photos of your harvest for automated data entry.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs access to your photo library to save captured photos.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app needs your location to help with cargo pickup and delivery coordination.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app needs your location to help with cargo pickup and delivery coordination.
